name: coa & rc DanaBot Trojan
description: Hijacked coa and rc packages download and execute DanaBot banking trojan DLL on Windows systems.

affected_packages.name: coa
affected_packages.note: Command-Option-Argument library, 9M weekly downloads at time of attack.

affected_packages.name: rc
affected_packages.note: Same malware payload as coa hijack.

remediation: Downgrade coa to 2.0.2 and rc to 1.2.8
Scan for DanaBot trojan with updated antivirus
Rotate all credentials - DanaBot is a banking trojan
